name: ProPetro Holding Corp.
summary: . Our Company We are a leading integrated energy service company, located in Midland, Texas, focused on providing innovative hydraulic fracturing, wireline, and other complementary energy and power generation services to leading upstream oil and gas companies engaged in the E&P of North American oil and natural gas resources.
